pending.body: `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:2458-2466` only retries when `is_timeout_related` or `is_transient_codex_failure` returns true, but `src/adapters/process_backend.rs:39-50` does not recognize `AppError::InvocationTimeout`. `AgentExecutionService` emits `InvocationTimeout` for both adapter-promoted timeouts and the service safety-net timeout (`src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs:259-264`, `395-410`), so reviewer and arbiter timeouts still fail immediately instead of using the transient retry loop.

The vote phase is still single-shot. `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:986-1013` calls `invoke_final_review_member_once(...)` directly for `final_review:voter`, so a transient transport failure while collecting votes is still recorded as an immediate failure. On a minimum-quorum panel, one network blip during voting can still fail the whole final_review stage, which leaves the bead's reviewer-retry goal incomplete.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 2 -> Plan and Implement
